RULE: These are the ONLY quantitative values either figure may display. Every number in a figure must appear verbatim here. Do NOT invent, round differently, or add any statistic not in this sheet. If a panel seems to need a number that is not here, use a qualitative label instead.
method_one_liner: A convex-cone directional-feasibility test: compose measured CRISPRi effect vectors; return a model-relative cone verdict, ranked mixture, greedy sparse panel, and Farkas/KKT dual certificate.

screen.source: Zhu et al. 2025 (Marson/Pritchard, CZI Virtual Cells Platform)

decomposition_signed.note: signed split is the more honest remainder; reachable share 39% identical to one-sided

positive_control.GATA3_down: Th2 master TF, must go DOWN: reached — rank 155/6871 (97.7th pctile), cosine +0.101, on the LOF/remove side
positive_control.TBX21_down: Th1 master TF, must go UP: correctly points AWAY when knocked down — rank 6775/6871 (1.4th pctile)

activation_certificate_meaning: leading positive unmet readouts at the closest cone projection; the full residual certifies the mismatch, while individual genes are follow-up hypotheses

transfer_norman_k562.dataset: Norman et al. 2019 K562 CRISPRa combinatorial (GSE133344)
transfer_norman_k562.additivity_meaning: measured double-perturbation vs sum-of-singles — additivity is a BOUNDED approximation, not exact

atlas.eight_shuffle_screening_z_range: 4.7 to 45.0 (descriptive; not a formal permutation tail probability)
atlas.takeaway: knockdown is never the majority modality; activation + irreducible always dominate

tractable_but_untried: IL7R (22 assoc, antibody-tractable, highest genetic support)
required_but_undruggable: IRF1 (17 immune-disease genetic assoc, top Th2 knockdown node, degrader-only / no conventional handle)

attrition_numbers.efficacy_failure_share: ~half of Phase II/III failures are lack of efficacy (Harrison 2016)
attrition_numbers.genetic_support_odds: 2.6x approval odds with human genetic support (Minikel 2024)

four_value_levers.number: ~half of Phase II/III failures are efficacy; autoimmune PoS ~15%
four_value_levers.funnel_stage: redirect modality before the expensive phase

four_value_levers.number: allocates scarce screen slots / animal cohorts per arm

go_stop_redirect.GO: above-null LOF alignment -> test a greedy sparse candidate panel in an arrayed screen
go_stop_redirect.STOP: target provably outside the cone -> do NOT spend a CRISPRi arm on it
go_stop_redirect.REDIRECT: substantial residual or GOF-proxy demand -> measure another modality; residual coordinates prioritize hypotheses

honesty_guardrails: Nominations are HYPOTHESES for wet-lab testing, not validated targets.
CRISPRi is loss-of-function only; activation hypotheses need a separate CRISPRa arm.
Multi-gene sets assume additivity (no epistasis) — each combination is an extrapolation to test. (Norman additivity median cos 0.71 shows it is bounded, not exact.)
One primary-cell system, four donors — external validity across genotypes/tissues is to be earned.
This is a hypothesis-prioritisation & experiment-triage instrument, NOT a target-validation engine. It does not claim a hit rate; it shifts where a program spends and where it stops.
